Kadir Has University

Interior Architecture and Environmental Design

Kadir Has University Department of Interior Architecture and Environmental Design aims to train interior architects equipped with creative and critical thinking skills by addressing the aesthetic, technical and psychological dimensions of spaces with a holistic approach. The department, which provides education in English, provides its students with competence in areas such as design, structural solutions and visualisation with a project-oriented curriculum. The education process, supported by sectoral collaborations, studio studies and field trips, enables students to gain hands-on experience. Graduates can work in the fields of interior design, project management and research and development.
